docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $506.00 FILED BY ODONNELL, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT FRIED, HAL (AKA AL FREED JR.) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED JUL-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIED, HAL (AKA AL FREED JR.)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ODONNELL, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIED, HAL (AKA AL FREED JR.) $406.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $496.00, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER WEEK, BEGINNING ON AUGUST 22, 2011 AND ON THE MONDAY OF EACH WEEK THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
